summary: Video sharing app with posts and replies functionality. User reported delete confirmation dialog closes but doesn't actually delete posts or replies.
known_issues: Delete confirmation dialog closes without deleting post/reply — affects both posts and replies, no error shown

existing_features.title: Fix the delete post mutation in VideoPostCard so that confirming the Delete dialog actually calls the backend deleteVideoPost function, awaits the result, and invalidates/removes the post from the query cache. The dialog must only close after the deletion succeeds.

Fix the delete reply mutation in VideoReplyCard so that confirming the Delete dialog actually calls the backend deleteVideoReply function, awaits the result, and invalidates/removes the reply from the query cache. The dialog must only close after the deletion succeeds.

new_feature_requests.summary: Audit the useDeleteVideoPost and useDeleteVideoReply mutation hooks in useQueries.ts to ensure they correctly reference the backend actor methods (e.g., actor.deleteVideoPost / actor.deleteVideoReply), pass the correct post/reply ID argument, and call queryClient.invalidateQueries or optimistically remove the item on success.

projectName: Fix delete post and reply — dialog closes without deleting
